description_long: This object is a chaise with a minimalist, modern design, featuring a rectangular frame constructed from dark wood. The chaise has four straight, vertical wooden legs at each corner, supporting the structure. A single, continuous black strap or band runs horizontally between the two longer sides, acting as a flexible backrest or support. The seat area appears to be a flat, light gray surface, possibly cushioned or upholstered, spanning the length of the frame. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The design suggests it is intended for public or semi-public urban spaces, such as parks or waiting areas.
description: A modern chaise with a dark wooden frame, straight legs, and a single black strap backrest over a flat, light gray seat. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: The chaise is seen from an angle showing the front and left side, highlighting the black strap backrest and the rectangular wooden frame.
description_view_1: This view shows the chaise from the rear right, emphasizing the straight wooden legs and the continuous black strap along the back.
description_view_2: A direct rear view reveals the full width of the black strap backrest and the rectangular seat area.
description_view_3: The chaise is viewed from the right side, showing the length of the seat and the alignment of the legs and strap.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest consists of a single, continuous black strap or band that runs horizontally between the two longer sides of the frame, providing a minimalist and flexible support. It is positioned at a moderate height and lacks any segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, vertical, and made of dark wood, matching the frame. They are simple in design with no visible decorative elements or tapering.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The seat area appears to have a solid, light gray surface with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are no visible loose or attached cushions; the seat appears to be a single, flat surface integrated into the frame.
